• HTML5 web-based mining game with multiplayer support
  • Uses Canvas for rendering, WebSockets/MQTT for networking
  • Features procedurally generated maps, inventory systems, and upgrade mechanics
  • Includes mobile controls, admin features, and cloud save functionality
    // Core game engine initialization
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.canvas = $('gameCanvas'); } }
    // Network connection setup
    class NetworkManager { connect() { this.client = mqtt.connect(playerConf.broker, options); } }

Mega Miner NG is a browser-based mining simulation game built with HTML5, Canvas, and JavaScript. The game features procedurally generated underground maps where players can mine resources, upgrade equipment, and interact with other players through real-time multiplayer networking using MQTT/WebSockets. It includes a comprehensive inventory system, upgrade shop, mobile controls, and cloud save functionality through Puter integration.
